nasb.text: So one of the priests whom they had carried away into exile from Samaria came and lived at Bethel, and taught them how they should fear the Lord.

esv.text: So one of the priests whom they had carried away from Samaria came and lived in Bethel and taught them how they should fear the Lord.

cnv.text: 於是從撒瑪利亞被擄來的祭司中，有一個回去，住在伯特利，教導他們怎樣敬畏耶和華。

ccb.text: 于是，有一位从撒玛利亚被掳走的祭司回去住在伯特利，教导他们怎样敬拜耶和华。
